metadata.title: Groww Credit: Instant Loan App
metadata.developer: Groww: Demat, Invest & Trade, Gold, Silver, Loans
metadata.description: Finance your dreams with Groww Credit Whether you need an instant personal loan or are looking for easy EMI options to finance your next big purchase, or simply want to check Credit Score for free, Groww Credit is your all-in-one credit app. What Groww Credit offers? 👉 Loan against Mutual Funds 👉 Instant personal loan 👉 Free Credit Score & Report Loan against Mutual Funds (LAMF) No need to sell your mutual fund investments, when you can use them to take loans! Pledge your mutual fund holdings, create your personalised credit limit, and get loans with lower interest rates. 💸 Interest only on what you withdraw 0️⃣ No foreclosure charges 💹 Zero impact on your mutual fund returns Instant personal loan Groww Credit offers instant personal loans up to ₹12.5 lakh with flexible repayment options at competitive interest rates. Whether you're salaried or self-employed, get instant approvals and funds disbursed directly to your bank account. 💰 Loan amount of your choice: Choose your instant personal loan amount up to your pre-approved limit (max ₹10 lakh). ⏳ Flexible tenure: Loan repayment tenure ranging from 3 months to 60 months. 📜 Transparent terms: No hidden charges, only clear and upfront terms. Free Credit Score & Report Monitor your credit health with ease. Check your Credit Score for free and get a detailed Credit Report. ✅ Know your Credit Score: Get better loan terms and more financial freedom. 🔎 Stay in control: Ensure there are no errors that could be holding you back. 📈 Track your progress: Improve your credit score, and make smart financial choices. Why Choose Groww Credit? ⚡ Instant personal loan access: Get pre-approved personal loans in minutes with no paperwork or hidden charges. ⏳ Flexible repayment options: Choose an EMI plan that fits your budget and lifestyle. Repayment tenures range from 3 months to 60 months, so you can pay at your own pace. 📈 Track your credit health: Regularly monitor your Credit Score to stay informed about your creditworthiness. Responsible financial habits can help you build a strong credit history and secure better financial opportunities in the future. Responsible lending Groww Credit adheres to responsible lending practices. Our policies and services comply with all applicable laws and regulations. We are committed to providing transparent and ethical financial services to our users. Instant Personal Loan: • Tenure: 3 to 60 months • APR: 13-48% Note: Personal loans are available for select users. Registered NBFCs and Banks (lenders) on Groww Credit: • IDFC First Bank Ltd • Kisetsu Saison Finance (India) Pvt Ltd • Groww Creditserv Technology Pvt Ltd • Earlysalary Services Private Limited ("Fibe") • Poonawalla Fincorp Limited • DSP Finance Private Limited Groww Credit is the DLA for the above lenders operating the Groww Credit platform and services therein with assistance from other LSPs. A representative example of the total cost of a loan, including principal & all applicable fees: Tenure- 12 months Rate of Interest - 15% per annum Processing fee - ₹1000 (2% inclusive GST) Total Interest - ₹4156 EMI - ₹4513 APR - 18.89% Amount Disbursed- ₹49000 Total repayment amount - ₹54156 Privacy policy: https://groww.in/privacy-policy Groww’s registered office: Vaishnavi Tech Park, South Tower, 3rd & 4th floor, Sarjapur Main Road, Bengaluru, Karnataka -560103
metadata.description_html:
Finance your dreams with Groww Credit

Whether you need an instant personal loan or are looking for easy EMI options to finance your next big purchase, or simply want to check Credit Score for free, Groww Credit is your all-in-one credit app.

What Groww Credit offers?
👉 Loan against Mutual Funds
👉 Instant personal loan
👉 Free Credit Score & Report

Loan against Mutual Funds (LAMF)
No need to sell your mutual fund investments, when you can use them to take loans! Pledge your mutual fund holdings, create your personalised credit limit, and get loans with lower interest rates.

💸 Interest only on what you withdraw
0️⃣ No foreclosure charges
💹 Zero impact on your mutual fund returns

Instant personal loan
Groww Credit offers instant personal loans up to ₹12.5 lakh with flexible repayment options at competitive interest rates. Whether you're salaried or self-employed, get instant approvals and funds disbursed directly to your bank account.

💰 Loan amount of your choice: Choose your instant personal loan amount up to your pre-approved limit (max ₹10 lakh).
⏳ Flexible tenure: Loan repayment tenure ranging from 3 months to 60 months.
📜 Transparent terms: No hidden charges, only clear and upfront terms.

Free Credit Score & Report
Monitor your credit health with ease. Check your Credit Score for free and get a detailed Credit Report.

✅ Know your Credit Score: Get better loan terms and more financial freedom.
🔎 Stay in control: Ensure there are no errors that could be holding you back.
📈 Track your progress: Improve your credit score, and make smart financial choices.

Why Choose Groww Credit?
⚡ Instant personal loan access: Get pre-approved personal loans in minutes with no paperwork or hidden charges.

⏳ Flexible repayment options: Choose an EMI plan that fits your budget and lifestyle. Repayment tenures range from 3 months to 60 months, so you can pay at your own pace.

📈 Track your credit health: Regularly monitor your Credit Score to stay informed about your creditworthiness. Responsible financial habits can help you build a strong credit history and secure better financial opportunities in the future.

Responsible lending
Groww Credit adheres to responsible lending practices. Our policies and services comply with all applicable laws and regulations. We are committed to providing transparent and ethical financial services to our users.

Instant Personal Loan:
• Tenure: 3 to 60 months
• APR: 13-48%

Note: Personal loans are available for select users.

Registered NBFCs and Banks (lenders) on Groww Credit:
• IDFC First Bank Ltd
• Kisetsu Saison Finance (India) Pvt Ltd
• Groww Creditserv Technology Pvt Ltd
• Earlysalary Services Private Limited ("Fibe")
• Poonawalla Fincorp Limited
• DSP Finance Private Limited

Groww Credit is the DLA for the above lenders operating the Groww Credit platform and services therein with assistance from other LSPs.

A representative example of the total cost of a loan, including principal & all applicable fees:

Tenure- 12 months
Rate of Interest - 15% per annum
Processing fee - ₹1000 (2% inclusive GST)
Total Interest - ₹4156
EMI - ₹4513
APR - 18.89%
Amount Disbursed- ₹49000
Total repayment amount - ₹54156

Privacy policy: https://groww.in/privacy-policy
Groww’s registered office: Vaishnavi Tech Park, South Tower, 3rd & 4th floor, Sarjapur Main Road, Bengaluru, Karnataka -560103
metadata.summary: Finance your dreams with Groww Credit Whether you need an instant personal loan or are looking for easy EMI options to finance your next big purchase, or simply want to check Credit Score fo

reviews.author: Hari Krishna
reviews.content: Worst experience, they charge penalties even after your bank account has sufficient balance, due to their error customers are being charged with penalties that are unimaginable. I will recommend going with others even with higher interest rates, at least they won't cheat.

reviews.author: Shaswat Bajpai
reviews.content: I have completed the process for personal loan, did kyc got the limit was about to disbursed but after 30 min, now it's showing something went wrong, please try again later. Failed to fetch your journey details

reviews.author: Rawan Kumar
reviews.content: this app is a scam, you have to pay not only interest but withdrawal charges aslo, which they dont mentioned earlier. besides this there are various other hidden charges which they dont mentioned before availing any loan. this app should be banned.

reviews.author: Aswini Pani
reviews.content: it's just a wrost app , within 2 to 3 days the personal loan offer gets disappear and also no option to choose emi date while taking loan.

reviews.author: Raja Bhatt
reviews.content: Never take PL from this app. SCAM!!! roi 17%, processing charges more than 30k for less than 8lac pl which they won't tell you before on top of it hidden charges. if you go for pledging MF they'll pledge all your funds, however they'll show you only few funds pledged. Customer service pathetic no proper information. since 20 days not able to get the details why they pledged all my funds, which wasn't required at all. pls avoid this app. this is legal scam app

reviews.author: Subrata Ghosh
reviews.content: I have a very bad experience regarding loans, they don't give loans where my cibil was very good. So never install these kinds of apps.

reviews.author: Bhatt 233
reviews.content: useless app.. I am investing in groww since two years but this groww credit is useless to me.. bad app. shows lower credit score than other apps. bad app

reviews.author: Prince Bathla
reviews.content: Fake app...first they offer a high amount loan and at last they suggested you are not eligible...

reviews.author: DEEPAK KUMAR
reviews.content: worst app for loan only showing approved loan if u can going to avail loan loan offer is missing and not disbursed

reviews.author: Vérified Reviewèr
reviews.content: pathetic.. on the excuse of auto-debit failure, this app is charging extra interest payment for Credit amount..This is akin to theft.

reviews.author: Prashant Kumbar
reviews.content: useless app.. 1)Couldn't even furnish my Credit score 2)line creation always fails for LAMF

reviews.author: Akshay Kotyal
reviews.content: Worst experience, they charge penalties even after your bank account has sufficient balance, due to their error customers are being charged with penalties that are unimaginable. I will recommend going with others even with higher interest rates, at least they won't cheat.

reviews.author: piyush kumar
reviews.content: collected all details, got eNACH accepted, and then gets stuck. Continue application asks for aadhar verification but then says 403 forbidden. Totally useless app. Earlier when we had just one groww app, it was easier to take loans.

reviews.author: Ediga Hari Prasad
reviews.content: Adding extra charges to outstanding amount There is no contact number also to contact these people. even though I am paying emis on time. they are increasing outstanding amount every month.

reviews.author: Anup Ray
reviews.content: App will take all your access digi locker , contact & Will activate Auto Pay . Later it shares your sanction letter & KFS but will not disburse the amount. Once you reach your Support team they will convey the loan has been cancelled.

reviews.author: royal pankaj
reviews.content: Please don't take a loan from them I paid my amount yesterday but it was still not processed and the customer support was very bad, i am fed up with them

reviews.author: Anand Pandey
reviews.content: High Charge , if you withdraw money then time it will charge you high processing fees and making fool to the public.

reviews.author: DHAWAL VANIA
reviews.content: First there is no option to add the bank statement manually, it directly takes to the aggregator and somehow they are unable to verify a simple statement where my salary is being credited for a year. Then suddenly I get a notification that the application got rejected despite having a credit score of 778 and the reason given is internal criteria. Out of the world service 😂😂😂

reviews.author: AdiTyA
reviews.content: worst app don't take any loan from this app because if you want to close your loan they don't open that option . and their customer service is more worse than this app because you can't connect with them easily. and they are useless they don't even try to solve your problem. they only say they will creat a ticket all the time

reviews.author: Arjun Shah
reviews.content: This app shows incorrect data. It should be banned.

reviews.author: Narayanan R
reviews.content: Everything seems simple accessible and convenient at first. But the process is where the problems hide. Onboarding runs into "unspecified errors" and needs to reach the customer support. That is another rabbit hole! So much that there are several hurdles to cross before some real person who can solve the problem looks at your complaint. Thereafter, you get onboard. The journey is also bumpy, and the epitome of pain is the exit part! They'll not let you out whatsoever! My LAMF is stuck forever...

reviews.author: Karan Wattamwar
reviews.content: loans at market rates. nothing special. worst part is customer care is a nightmare. there are 100 different questions in the FAQ section and no sight of a toll free number or email id. called some customer care number from google and have been dropped from the QUEUE for customer support 3 times now. this is frustrating

reviews.author: Piyush Ghediya
reviews.content: credit score not show properly please check the status of the day

reviews.author: Kaustubh Mani
reviews.content: I was trying for a loan.it was showing in my app.. I completed all process.vedio call process also.. after that I didn't get any update or the amount.which was I trying to get as loan...
